subcodes.first_line: O friends! The call is the call of the Covenant, and the effect of the pen is the Luminary of the horizons. The candle of bounty is the light of this gathering [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران بانگ بانگ میثاق است و عهد اثر خامه نیر آفاق شمع موهبت شاهد انجمن است
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
